creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
Created attachment 165463
sysutils/ansible: 2.0.0.0

Please update sysutils/ansible to 2.0.0.0.
This is a major release.

Announcement: http://www.ansible.com/blog/ansible-2.0-launch
Changes: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ansible/ansible/v2.0.0.0-1/CHANGELOG.md

This update includes an UPDATING entry and creates a slave port for Ansible 1.9.4.
This update was prepared and polished over the last few weeks with beta and RC versions. Both ports are clean and functional.
